task_objective: Add regression tests to protect the newly fixed execution paths from future regressions.
design_decisions: Created test_execution_paths.py utilizing the subprocess module to test process execution end-to-end.
Added test_wrapper_diagnostic_is_on_stderr to run run.sh with echo to verify stdout does not contain diagnostic messages while stderr does.
Added test_cli_standalone_execution to run uv run cli.py --help and verify no ModuleNotFoundError is raised on stdout/stderr, proving standalone PEP 723 capability.
results: Regression tests written and executed cleanly. All validation checks (ruff check/format, ty, pytest) passed successfully.
